title: Phase 21.4 — GSC Indexing Retry + Deployment Measurement Baseline
executive_summary: Phase 21.4 verified 6 of 7 target URLs are live (1 slug corrected). GSC UI indexing retry failed — the CloakBrowser persistent profile (google-gsc-v3) has lost property verification (redirects to /not-verified). Pages are in the sitemap with internal links and will be discovered organically. Measurement baseline established for all 15 targets with 4 effectiveness tests and 3-28 day windows.

gsc_indexing_result.root_cause: GSC session property verification expired. Requires Qasem to re-verify in non-headless browser.
gsc_indexing_result.alternative: Pages in sitemap + internal links = organic discovery path
